content.name: DeadAir Economy Overhaul (X4 9.x compat fork)
content.description: DeadAir Economy Overhaul v1.13HF1 by DeadAirRT (GPL-3.0), maintained for X4 9.x compatibility by mlog4. Tested on X4 9.0 beta 7. Companion to DeadAir Scripts (X4 9.x compat fork) — install both. See CHANGELOG.md for details. https://github.com/mlog4/deadair_eco
content.author: DeadAirRT (orig); mlog4 (9.x compat fork)

text.name: DeadAir Eco
text.description: Rebalance of pricing, production, and general economy.
text.author: DeadAir
